summary: Plan-mode classification only. #72111 remains the open canonical issue for the mixed command+url MCP transport timeout. #72515 is an open PR linked to #72111, but the job explicitly marks it as a security-signal ref that must be routed rather than handled by Clownfish.

actions.reason: Keep #72111 as the canonical open issue because it is the live non-security report for the root cause and the only hydrated open issue in the cluster.
The job explicitly marks #72515 as a security-signal ref requiring central security routing, so Clownfish should not close, merge, label, comment on, or repair this PR.
